relic.excesssigil.name: Sigil Of Excess
relic.excesssigil.description: The owner’s spell cards have +2 added to their effects, but the owner's attacks have -2 power.
relic.excesssigil.flavor.1: An ancient sigil, one that amplifies everything it touches, even the simplest incantation.
relic.desperation.name: Desperation
relic.desperation.description:
At the start of the turn, if the owner is below 25% of their maximum HP, their cards cost 1 less MP to play.
Cost cannot be reduced below 0 by this effect.
relic.desperation.flavor.1: When the heart races against time, every breath is a bargain with the inevitable.
relic.pactbrand.name: Pact Brand
relic.pactbrand.description: When the owner plays an attack card, attacks on that card gain +2 power and the owner takes 2 fixed damage.
relic.pactbrand.flavor.1: A scar on your soul, offering power at the cost of your own vitality.
relic.powerring.name: Ring of Power
relic.powerring.description: At the start of the turn, the owner gains X Attack Power Up and X Fragile (X is the current turn count, up to 3).
relic.powerring.flavor.1: Time spirals into your favor, but each passing moment chips away at your resolve.
relic.loosepockets.name: Loose Pockets
relic.loosepockets.description: At the start of the turn, the owner draws 1 extra card. At the end of the turn, the owner discards 1 card randomly from their hand.
relic.loosepockets.flavor.1: Bountiful distractions in your hands, but only chaos remains when the cards fall.
relic.twilightband.name: Twilight Band
relic.twilightband.description:
The owner gains +1 Card Slot.

The owner’s Max HP is reduced by 15%.
relic.twilightband.flavor.1: The band glows with the waning light of a forgotten promise, a weight both empowering and destructive.
relic.memorychain.name: Memory Chain
relic.memorychain.description:
The owner gains +1 Card Slot.

At the start of combat, the owner takes 1 fixed damage for each of their unfilled card slots.
relic.memorychain.flavor.1: The past is a chain around your wrist, pulling you toward both your potential and your downfall.
relic.unevenodds.name: Uneven Odds
relic.unevenodds.description: At the start of the turn, if enemies outnumber allies, gain 1 Attack Power Up per extra enemy; if allies outnumber enemies, a random ally gains 1 Fragile per extra ally.
relic.unevenodds.flavor.1: The fewer at his side, the stronger he stood. The more, the more brittle their hope became.
relic.echoofone.name: Echo of One
relic.echoofone.description: At the start of the turn, if the owner is the only alive ally, they gain 3 Attack Power Up.
relic.echoofone.flavor.1: In silence, the lone echo grows louder, until all that's left is purpose.
relic.lastlight.name: Last Light
relic.lastlight.description:
When any of your units would die, instead restore them to half of their Max HP.
This effect can only trigger once per unit, per battle.
relic.lastlight.flavor.1: Even the dimmest flame resists the dark… If only for a moment.
relic.recursiveheart.name: Recursive Heart
relic.recursiveheart.description: The first card the owner plays each turn is returned to their hand.
relic.recursiveheart.flavor.1: It beats again. And again. And again.
relic.fatesfavor.name: Fate's Favor
relic.fatesfavor.description: At the start of the turn, if the owner has no cards in hand, they gain 2 Protection.
relic.fatesfavor.flavor.1: When fate smiles, it grants both power and protection.
relic.echoingshield.name: Echoing Shield
relic.echoingshield.description: At the start of the second turn onward, the owner gains 1 Protection for each card they played on the previous turn (Max. 2).
relic.echoingshield.flavor.1: The echoes of your past actions shield you, but only if you remember to listen.
relic.overchannelorgan.name: Overchannel Organ
relic.overchannelorgan.description:
The owner gains +2 Max MP.

At the start of combat, the owner takes fixed damage equal to half the MP they had unspent.
relic.overchannelorgan.flavor.1: It feeds on restraint, punishing hesitation with internal collapse.
relic.bleedingstatue.name: Weeping Statue
relic.bleedingstatue.description: At the start of the turn, all units gain 2 Bleed.
relic.bleedingstatue.flavor.1: A statue that weeps blood. It's sorrow is contagious.
relic.maskofjoy.name: Mask Of Joy
relic.maskofjoy.description:
At the start of the second turn onward, the owner gains 1 Attack Power Up for every 5 damage they took last turn (Max. 2).

If they took less than 5 damage, they gain 1 Attack Power Down instead.
relic.maskofjoy.flavor.1: An ancient comedy mask. It laughs as you suffer.
relic.maskofsorrow.name: Mask Of Sorrow
relic.maskofsorrow.description:
At the start of the second turn onward, the owner gains 1 Protection for every 5 damage they took last turn (Max. 2).

If they took less than 5 damage, they gain 1 Fragile instead.
relic.maskofsorrow.flavor.1: An ancient tragedy mask. It weeps for your cowardice.
relic.masquerade.name: Masquerade
relic.masquerade.description: At the start of the turn, all status ailments affecting the owner are halved.
relic.masquerade.flavor.1: A grand performance where joy and sorrow dance in tandem.
relic.reflectiveplate.name: Reflective Plate
relic.reflectiveplate.description: When the owner's Shield is broken by an enemy, deal 3 fixed damage to the attacker.
relic.reflectiveplate.flavor.1: The final glint before the blade strikes back.
relic.expresscard.name: Express Card
relic.expresscard.description:
Reduce the cost of all items in the shop by 50%.
Cost cannot be reduced below 0 by this effect.
relic.expresscard.flavor.1:
A card that grants great discounts at select merchants.
Praised by bargain hunters everywhere.
relic.moneybank.name: Money Bank
relic.moneybank.description:
Upon pickup, gain 100 gold.

At the end of a battle, gain extra gold equal to 10% of the gold earned in that battle (rounded down).
relic.moneybank.flavor.1: A small bank that stores a fraction of your earnings for later use.
relic.refresh.name: Refresh
relic.refresh.description: Activatable once per battle. On activation, refresh the owner's hand (Refresh: Discard the hand and draw the same number of cards.).
relic.refresh.flavor.1: A moment of clarity in the chaos of battle.
relic.rewards.name: Rewards Voucher
relic.rewards.description: Gain the ability to re-roll your battle rewards once.
relic.rewards.flavor.1: A token that promises better fortunes with a second chance.
relic.fortunesfavor.name: Fortune’s Favor
relic.fortunesfavor.description:
Increase the chances of finding higher tier cards, card packs and relics.
Uncommon: +100%
Rare: +50%
Epic: +25%
relic.fortunesfavor.flavor.1: A charm that seems to attract better treasures wherever you go.
